subtitle: A 150-meter pebble strand under a 100-meter white cliff that once only goats could reach, on a fault that keeps reshaping it.

levers.photo_tone: high-key turquoise water against a bleached vertical limestone wall, hard Ionian midday light

spike_statement: The name means goat port because once only goats could reach it; a sheer 100-meter cliff still rations who walks the stairway down to the pebbles.
